VLAN    Name                             Ports                       Type     Authorization
----    -------------------------------- --------------------------- -------- -------------
 1      default                          gi1-2,gi4-22,Po1-8          Default  Required
 10     Admin                            gi3                         Static   Required
 20     Management                                                   Static   Required
 30     Trusted                          gi1-2                       Static   Required
